title: Destinations
description: A place the trip visits, with the dates the traveller is there. The unit the researcher and scheduler fan out over.

tripId.description: the trip this destination belongs to

orderIndex.description: position in the trip sequence; lower comes first

notes.description: planner notes about why this stop and what to prioritise

lat.description: geocoded latitude (Nominatim), used for the map and weather forecast; null until geocoded

lng.description: geocoded longitude (Nominatim), used for the map and weather forecast; null until geocoded
